response.global_analysis: The video contains English commentary by Ina (Ninomae Ina'nis) and Japanese dialogue with other Hololive members (Subaru, Anya, Watame, Polka, Noel) during Minecraft gameplay. Subtitles are precisely mapped to the spoken audio and translated/transcribed accordingly.

subtitles.original: But like, it also has to be like the fun members have... like the participants have, right? Like not everyone is...
subtitles.english: But like, it also has to be like the fun members have... like the participants have, right? Like not everyone is...

subtitles.original: ...good to always sit around and only talk for like, four hours.
subtitles.english: ...good to always sit around and only talk for like, four hours.

subtitles.original: Some people, to have fun, need active stuff to do.
subtitles.english: Some people, to have fun, need active stuff to do.

subtitles.original: Like, what I'm realizing more and more these days is like, viewers having fun is one thing, but like if I don't have fun when I'm...
subtitles.english: Like, what I'm realizing more and more these days is like, viewers having fun is one thing, but like if I don't have fun when I'm...

subtitles.original: ...like, producing... Ah! My axe! Okay, we have to go to town.
subtitles.english: ...like, producing... Ah! My axe! Okay, we have to go to town.

subtitles.original: Like, if I don't have fun, then like, I don't want to.
subtitles.english: Like, if I don't have fun, then like, I don't want to.

subtitles.original: Like, if I'm not having fun, I think it translates to whatever output I have.
subtitles.english: Like, if I'm not having fun, I think it translates to whatever output I have.

subtitles.original: It's something that I've just realized over the years.
subtitles.english: It's something that I've just realized over the years.

subtitles.original: Just like, enthusiasm and stuff is like... what should I say?
subtitles.english: Just like, enthusiasm and stuff is like... what should I say?

subtitles.original: It's... it gets pretty obvious at a certain point where you're just like,
subtitles.english: It's... it gets pretty obvious at a certain point where you're just like,

subtitles.original: 'Hey, I think this content creator is really enjoying, you know, what they're doing and stuff.'
subtitles.english: 'Hey, I think this content creator is really enjoying, you know, what they're doing and stuff.'

subtitles.original: And then sometimes it's like, oh, they're doing things out of obligation.
subtitles.english: And then sometimes it's like, oh, they're doing things out of obligation.

subtitles.original: これ売って、これ売って、あとは...
subtitles.english: Sell this, sell this, and then...

subtitles.original: これどこで売るんだ？アルケミストか。
subtitles.english: Where do I sell this? At the alchemist?

subtitles.original: I harvested some fresh carrots. I shall put it up in the shop.
subtitles.english: I harvested some fresh carrots. I shall put it up in the shop.

subtitles.original: Oh, yes, please! Yes, yes, yes! Carrots!
subtitles.english: Oh, yes, please! Yes, yes, yes! Carrots!

subtitles.original: I don't know how carrot... how much carrots go for.
subtitles.english: I don't know how much carrots go for.

subtitles.original: Yeah, me too, I don't know.
subtitles.english: Yeah, me too, I don't know.

subtitles.original: I'll just put it at 15 for... They're pretty easy.
subtitles.english: I'll just put them at 15... They're pretty easy.

subtitles.original: All right, enjoy! I'll put up more later.
subtitles.english: All right, enjoy! I'll put up more later.

subtitles.original: That's why they say enthusiasm is contagious. So...
subtitles.english: That's why they say enthusiasm is contagious. So...

subtitles.original: 先輩もあれやってるんですか？
subtitles.english: Are you doing that too, Senpai?

subtitles.original: いや、多分... 多分これ...
明日からできないんですよ。できないよ絶対に！
subtitles.english: We won't be able to do it tomorrow. We absolutely won't!
It's now or never! I'm doing it!

subtitles.original: 今日だってば！今、今日さ！本当に！今日。
subtitles.english: I'm telling you, it's today! Right now, today! Really! Today.

subtitles.original: 先輩もあれやってるんですか？
subtitles.english: Are you doing that too, Senpai?

subtitles.original: あー！それもいいですね。
お、頑張ってんだ。頑張れー！
subtitles.english: Oh, you're working hard. Keep it up!

subtitles.original: She got them both. No wonder they haven't been coming around.
subtitles.english: She got them both. No wonder they haven't been coming around.

subtitles.original: She has them to help out.
subtitles.english: She has them to help out.

subtitles.original: She has them hostage. Oh no.
subtitles.english: She has them hostage. Oh no.

subtitles.original: 途中までだけど、さっき一緒に行ったあれ、なんだっけ？ダンジョンの分け前を...
subtitles.english: It was only halfway, but the share of the dungeon we went to together earlier...
